test_TEST002_VRFTimeout_5MinutesTimeout(.details: The implementation uses `<` operator, so at exactly 5 minutes fallback is allowed.      This test verifies fallback fails 1 second BEFORE timeout.

test_TEST002_VRFTimeout_CanFallbackAfter.details: FIX: checkTopic2=false because we don't know the selected prover address beforehand

test_TEST005_Boundary_ExactlyAtTimeout().details: The implementation uses `block.timestamp < requestedAt + VRF_TIMEOUT`      which means at exactly 5 minutes, the condition is FALSE, allowing fallback.      This is consistent with VRFTimeoutBoundaryTest.test_TriggerFallback_ExactlyAtTimeout_ShouldSucceed

test_TEST002_VRFTimeout_5MinutesTimeout(.notice: Test that fallback fails one second before the 5 minute timeout

test_TEST002_VRFTimeout_CanFallbackAfter.notice: Test fallback after timeout selects a valid prover

test_TEST005_Boundary_ExactlyAtTimeout().notice: Test that fallback succeeds at exactly the 5 minute boundary
